Model class representing a user profile in the application.

Empty constructor required for Firebase or default object creation.
UserProfiles(String, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.example.myapplication.UserProfiles
Used for creating a new account for the user Users who want to be admin are not admin by default but rather entrants They will have to ask for admin, and then someone with access to the database will give them perms

Tests that the UserProfiles class: Initializes default values correctly using the empty constructor.

Activity that allows organizers or co-organizers to search for users and invite them to an event.
